title: Native discourse markers
subtitle: Use small words that make speech flow.
duolingoBridge: B1 Hi moves from controlled B1 into native-style but accessible French: short articles, real conversations, nuanced opinions, and longer connected output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: use markers to manage your answer.
Knowledge point 2: sound natural without overusing fillers.

items.fr: En fait, je pensais que ce serait plus difficile.
items.en: Actually, I thought it would be more difficult.
items.es: En realidad pensaba que sería más difícil.

items.fr: Du coup, j’ai commencé à pratiquer un peu chaque jour.
items.en: So, I started practicing a little every day.
items.es: Entonces empecé a practicar un poco cada día.

items.fr: Bref, ce n’était pas parfait, mais j’ai continué.
items.en: In short, it was not perfect, but I continued.
items.es: En fin, no era perfecto, pero continué.

items.fr: En tout cas, cette expérience m’a donné confiance.
items.en: In any case, this experience gave me confidence.
items.es: En todo caso, esta experiencia me dio confianza.

items.fr: Je fais encore des erreurs, mais je parle quand même.
items.en: I still make mistakes, but I speak anyway.
items.es: Todavía cometo errores, pero hablo de todos modos.
